mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(attempt_no), 0) FROM patra_ingest.ing_task_run WHERE task_id = #{taskId} and deleted = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE patra_ingest.ing_task_run SET last_heartbeat = #{now}, updated_at = #{now}, checkpoint =
CAST(#{checkpointJson} AS JSON)
NULL
WHERE id = #{runId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE patra_ingest.ing_task_run SET status_code = 'FAILED', error = #{errorMsg}, finished_at = #{now}, last_heartbeat = #{now}, updated_at = #{now} WHERE id = #{runId} AND deleted = 0
